Obsidian-scaled dragon with cracked ivory horns and a blind milky left eye, breathing fire across the ground in a wide sweeping arc.
Crimson dragon with torn wing membranes healed ragged and gold eyes, tearing into the carcass of a massive elk with blood-stained fangs.
Emerald-scaled ancient with moss growing in old flank wounds and bronze-tipped horns, sleeping curled with tail wrapped around its body protectively.
Sapphire dragon with frost-rimed scales and ice-blue wing membranes, exhaling a billowing cloud of freezing mist that crystallizes in the air.
Gold-scaled behemoth with chipped fangs and battle scars across its chest, roaring from atop a pile of ancient bones with wings spread wide.
Silver dragon with ash-white underbelly and missing scale patches on its neck, preening damaged wing membranes with careful attention.
Bronze colossus with barnacle-crusted belly and amber eyes, launching from a cliff ledge with wings snapping open thunderously.
Ivory dragon with rust-colored stains on claws and cracked spinal ridge, rearing back to strike with forelimbs raised menacingly.
Amber-scaled veteran with torn left wing and clouded right eye, prowling low with shoulders hunched and head scanning side to side.
Copper dragon with verdigris patches and bent horn tips, scratching its scarred flank against jutting rock with satisfied rumbling.
Iron-grey elder with cathedral-sized wingspan and ancient weathered scales, watching with patient unblinking yellow eyes and coiled stillness.
Midnight-blue dragon with silver-edged scales and jagged tail spikes, bellowing territorial challenge with neck arched and chest expanded.
Ash-white dragon with charcoal wing membranes and missing teeth, shaking torrential rain from its wings in explosive spray.
Blood-red dragon with black claws and scarred muzzle, grappling mid-air with another dragon in a tangle of wings and fury.
Jade-scaled hunter with keen green eyes and sleek build, stalking forward with wings half-folded and muscles coiled to pounce.
Rust-colored ancient with moss-covered horns and sagging wing leather, yawning to reveal rows of yellowed fangs in cavernous jaws.
Cobalt dragon with lightning-white scars and splintered horns, releasing crackling arcs of electricity from its gaping maw.
Amethyst-scaled dragon with opalescent wing membranes and notched ear frills, spreading wings in aggressive threat display with hissing breath.
Bone-white leviathan with hollow eye sockets and skeletal appearance, drinking deeply from a mountain stream with wings folded tight.
Coal-black dragon with magma-orange eyes and molten cracks between scales, spewing liquid fire that drips like burning honey.
Malachite-green dragon with copper veins in scales and battle-torn wings, marking territory by gouging deep claw-furrows into stone.
Pewter-grey dragon with storm-cloud underbelly and crooked spine, landing heavily with impact that sends debris flying outward.
Burnt-orange dragon with sand-scoured scales and sun-bleached horns, basking with wings spread to maximum span absorbing warmth.
Glacial-blue dragon with icicle-fanged maw and frozen wing edges, crunching through frozen bones with ear-splitting cracks.
Forest-green ancient with bark-textured scales and root-like horns, sniffing the air with nostrils flared and head raised high.
